name: wrapped
_note: cognitive-replay.wrapped composes Spotify-Wrapped-style summary cards over the caller's live corpus. Every card value is computed (turns/tokens/top brain/archetype/busiest day/peak hour/citations/tools) — no fabricated rows. sinceDays clamps to [1,365]; peakHour is always a valid hour 0..23 even on an empty corpus (defaults to 0). An empty corpus yields archetype 'The Generalist' with zeroed cards, ok:true (degrade-graceful).
